Product: SonicWave Bluetooth Headphones - Noise Cancelling, Over-Ear, 30H Battery

Hands-Free Calling: Integrated mic with noise reduction for clear phone conversations. Sleek, Durable Design: Lightweight and foldable for easy portability and storage.
